title: Adventure and Travel
description: Embark on a journey in Minecraft and adventure along the way.
body:
# Adventure and Travel
Embark on a journey in Minecraft and adventure along the way.

Initially, I made this modpack just to play with my friends on my server. Then I found it seemed pretty good. So I decided to publish it.

## feature
There's a huge world for you to explore, and you can have a bird's eye view of the world from a mountain over 300 blocks high.

More terrains and biomes, richer nature.

More ruins for you to explore, the adventure never ends.

Improve your level and equipment strength to defeat powerful bosses.

Keep the vanilla elements without affecting the vanilla gameplay, you can still play in the vanilla way.

Low performance requirements, you don't need a very powerful computer to run it smoothly.

## How to play
Just play the way you like. Because it is very free, without various tasks and restrictions.

I can tell you a little bit about how to play.

- Choose a place you like and live in here.

- Travel with your pets and enjoy the scenery along the way.

- Bring powerful equipment to explore the Nether.

- Use magic to challenge powerful bosses.

## Performance requirements
Client: Allocate at least 4GB RAM, and the graphics card and CPU are sufficient to play vanilla.

Server: Allocate at least 4GB RAM, and the CPU is sufficient to run vanilla, and allocate at least 1~3Mbps bandwidth for each player.
## How to install
You can install it as a normal Modrinth modpack.
